description: Import, complete, and analyze the creator's OWN past videos across YouTube/Instagram/TikTok/Pinterest. Export-bundle floor with an optional flag-gated live OAuth pull; on-device STT completes transcripts; the YouTube retention curve is joined to the transcript; nothing is fabricated and the importer proposes while the human saves.

steps.label: Import metadata + stats from the export bundle (or optional live API)
steps.notes: Runs ingest-route on the bundle (halts on QUARANTINE/BLOCK), applies the platform parser, and proposes records with per-field provenance. Retention null off YouTube; revenue only from a Studio CSV. Human saves via tools/video_library.py upsert.

steps.label: Match downloaded media and complete the withheld fields on-device
steps.notes: Matches each downloaded file to a video_key, runs local STT for missing transcripts (run_local_stt gap when no backend), derives chapters/keywords, and joins retention to the transcript. Composes transcript-import per video. Proposal-only.

steps.label: Per-video transcript (uploaded caption or local STT)
steps.notes: Prefers a creator-uploaded YouTube caption; otherwise on-device STT. Never scrapes, never fabricates, never downloads ASR tracks (403).

steps.label: Grounded analysis of the completed library
steps.notes: Top tags, YouTube retention peaks/cliffs with the spoken words, format/category performance, transcript themes. Every figure cites video_keys; unavailable data null-flagged, never estimated.

boundaries: All imported data stays local and gitignored (.local). Retention is YouTube-only; revenue is Studio-CSV-only; the live importer builds no monetary URL. Transcripts are on-device STT (zero cloud, zero tokens) or a creator-uploaded caption; absent a backend, transcripts are flagged run_local_stt, never faked. The importer proposes; the human saves. No posting (that is content-distributor). Class C: needs a local runtime and the creator's files.
